error_signature: binding a non array value to a div
title: Incorrect binding of user email to text element
symptom: The user is unable to display the authenticated user's email on the dashboard due to improper binding of the data source.
applies_when: Trying to display user email on a text element
root_cause: The issue arises because the user is attempting to bind a non-array value (the user's email) to a div element that expects an array. This mismatch leads to the failure in displaying the email correctly.
fix_steps: Select the text element where the email should be displayed
Ensure that the binding is not done through a container expecting an array
Save the changes and refresh the dashboard
agent_instruction: Bind the text element directly to 'Supabase Auth - ['user'].email'.
